title: helianthemum glomeratum
intro: Helianthemum glomeratum, also known as rockrose or sticky wild rose, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae, commonly found in dry and rocky areas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation, which is attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum glomeratum include its potential to prevent cancer, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Helianthemum glomeratum can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
